items.title: Why Honeywell Stock Ticked Higher Today
items.description: A prominent bank upgraded its recommendation on the company.  Not coincidentally, this followed Honeywell's fine first-quarter earnings report.  Storied industrial conglomerate Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON) had a fine Wednesday on the stock exchange.
